name: autopilot-codex
description: Codex-native autopilot runtime bundle with phase-state hooks, approval gates, red/blue execution, auto-fix, and QA closure.

interface.shortDescription: Full-runtime autopilot workflows for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: Installs autopilot-codex, autopilot-commit-codex, and autopilot-doctor-codex as official Codex plugin skills, plus a phase-state Stop hook runtime that advances design, implement, QA, auto-fix, and merge loops with explicit approval gates and red/blue workflow parity.
defaultPrompt: Use Autopilot for Codex to run the full phase-state autopilot workflow.
Use Autopilot Commit for Codex to prepare a verified Chinese git commit.
Use Autopilot Doctor for Codex to audit project readiness for autopilot.
